meta.description: Lunar New Year Fortune - Discover your 2026 fortune based on your Chinese zodiac sign!
meta.keywords: lunar new year fortune, chinese zodiac, 2026 horoscope, fortune telling, zodiac compatibility
meta.og_title: Lunar New Year Fortune | 2026 Zodiac Reading
meta.og_description: Discover your 2026 fortune based on your Chinese zodiac. Get readings for Wealth, Health, Love, and Career!

intro.title: Lunar New Year Fortune
intro.subtitle: 2026 Year of the Horse
intro.description: Select your birth year and discover your fortune for the new year! Draw four cards to reveal your destiny in Wealth, Health, Love, and Career.

drawing.title: Draw Your Cards
drawing.instruction: Tap each card to reveal your fortune

overall.excellent: This year will be exceptional in every way! Move forward with confidence and embrace new challenges.
overall.good: A favorable year awaits you. Keep working steadily and good results will follow.
overall.average: A stable and steady year. Stay true to the basics and good things will come your way.
overall.below: There may be challenges ahead, but with wisdom and patience, you can overcome them all.

wealth.great: A surge of financial fortune is heading your way! Investments and ventures will be blessed with luck.
wealth.good: Steady income flows your way. This is an excellent time for saving and building wealth.
wealth.normal: Finances remain stable without major changes. Maintain your current course.
wealth.caution: Unexpected expenses may arise. Keep an emergency fund ready and avoid impulsive purchases.
wealth.bad: Be cautious with finances. Take a break from risky investments and focus on preserving what you have.

health.great: Vibrant health and boundless energy! A perfect time to start a new fitness routine.
health.good: Your health remains strong overall. Maintain your good habits.
health.normal: Health is manageable if you don't overdo it. Keep up with basic self-care.
health.caution: Watch out for overwork and stress. Prioritize rest and relaxation.
health.bad: Health needs attention! Schedule regular check-ups and listen to your body's signals.

love.great: A destined encounter awaits! Love will bloom beautifully in your life.
love.good: Warm and stable romance continues. Small moments of happiness fill your days.
love.normal: Love life remains calm and peaceful. Let things unfold naturally.
love.caution: Misunderstandings may arise. Open and honest communication is key.
love.bad: Romantic challenges may test you. Patience and understanding are needed now.

career.great: Incredible opportunities for advancement are coming! Promotions and new positions await.
career.good: Your hard work pays off. Recognition from superiors is likely.
career.normal: A stable year at work. Focus on building skills rather than seeking big changes.
career.caution: Mind your workplace relationships. Avoid unnecessary conflicts with colleagues.
career.bad: Workplace challenges are expected. Stay patient and resilient through difficulties.

share.title: Share Your Fortune
share.twitterText: I just drew my 2026 Lunar New Year fortune! {{zodiac}} Check yours too!
